timestamp_analysis.description: Rules for detecting timestamp inconsistencies and anomalies

rules.name: Timestamp Field Consistency
rules.description: Check if timestamps across different metadata fields are consistent within threshold
rules.logic: IF count(distinct_timestamps) > threshold THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Found {count} different timestamps across metadata fields with maximum difference of {max_diff} seconds. Original camera images typically have timestamps within seconds of each other.

rules.name: Timestamp Logical Ordering
rules.description: Verify timestamps follow logical sequence: capture <= create <= modify
rules.logic: IF DateTimeOriginal > CreateDate OR CreateDate > ModifyDate THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Timestamps violate logical ordering: {violation_details}. This may indicate manual timestamp manipulation.

rules.name: Future Date Detection
rules.description: Detect timestamps set in the future relative to analysis time
rules.logic: IF any_timestamp > current_time THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Timestamp {timestamp} is set {days_ahead} days in the future, which is unusual for original camera captures.

rules.name: Timezone Information Consistency
rules.description: Check for consistent timezone information across metadata
rules.logic: IF timezone_info_exists AND timezones_inconsistent THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Inconsistent timezone information detected across metadata fields.

software_analysis.description: Rules for detecting software-related anomalies and mismatches

rules.name: Software-Camera Compatibility Check
rules.description: Verify if software signature is compatible with reported camera model
rules.logic: IF software NOT IN camera_manufacturer_software THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Software '{software}' doesn't match expected software for {camera_make} cameras. This may indicate post-capture processing.

rules.name: Software Version Anomaly Detection
rules.description: Detect suspicious or impossible software versions
rules.logic: IF software_version < release_date_of_camera OR version_format_invalid THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Software version {version} is incompatible with camera release date {camera_release_date}.

rules.name: Editing Software Signature Detection
rules.description: Detect presence of photo editing software signatures
rules.logic: IF software CONTAINS editing_keywords THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Editing software '{software}' detected in metadata, indicating possible post-processing.

compression_analysis.description: Rules for analyzing compression history and artifacts

rules.name: Double JPEG Compression Detection
rules.description: Detect multiple JPEG compression cycles using DCT coefficient analysis
rules.logic: IF compression_cycles > 1 AND confidence > threshold THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Detected {cycles} compression cycles. Original camera JPEGs typically have single-stage compression.

rules.name: Quantization Table Anomaly
rules.description: Detect non-standard or edited quantization tables
rules.logic: IF quantization_table NOT IN standard_tables THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Non-standard quantization tables detected, suggesting customized compression settings.

rules.name: Compression Quality Anomaly
rules.description: Detect unusually high or low compression quality
rules.logic: IF estimated_quality < 75 OR estimated_quality > 98 THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Estimated JPEG quality {quality}% is outside normal camera range (75-98%).

rules.name: Image Resaving Detection
rules.description: Detect evidence of image being saved multiple times
rules.logic: IF multiple_sof_markers OR progressive_encoding_changes THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Found indicators of image being saved {estimated_times} times, suggesting multiple editing sessions.

metadata_integrity.description: Rules for assessing metadata completeness and consistency

rules.name: Metadata Stripping Patterns
rules.description: Detect patterns of metadata removal characteristic of social media or editing
rules.logic: IF (essential_fields_missing AND file_not_raw) OR metadata_size < threshold THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Metadata appears stripped or minimal ({metadata_size} bytes). Original camera images typically have extensive metadata.

rules.name: MakerNotes Consistency Check
rules.description: Verify manufacturer-specific metadata integrity
rules.logic: IF makernotes_present AND (checksum_invalid OR structure_corrupted) THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: MakerNotes metadata appears corrupted or inconsistent, which may indicate tampering.

rules.name: Thumbnail-Main Image Consistency
rules.description: Check if embedded thumbnail matches main image characteristics
rules.logic: IF thumbnail_exists AND (dimensions_mismatch OR metadata_inconsistent) THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Embedded thumbnail differs from main image in {differences}. Thumbnails are typically regenerated during editing.

rules.name: Cross-Field Consistency Check
rules.description: Verify consistency between related metadata fields
rules.logic: IF related_fields_inconsistent THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Inconsistent values found between related metadata fields: {inconsistent_pairs}.

platform_detection.description: Rules for identifying image origin platforms

rules.name: WhatsApp Compression Patterns
rules.description: Identify WhatsApp-specific compression and metadata patterns
rules.logic: IF (dimensions_match AND metadata_stripped AND quality_range) THEN identify
rules.explanation_template: Image matches {match_count} of {total_count} WhatsApp fingerprints including dimensions {dimensions} and stripped metadata.

rules.name: Instagram Platform Patterns
rules.description: Identify Instagram-specific characteristics
rules.logic: IF (aspect_ratio_1_1 OR max_dimension_1080) AND metadata_stripped THEN identify
rules.explanation_template: Image shows Instagram platform patterns: {matched_patterns}.

rules.name: Direct Camera Capture Indicators
rules.description: Identify characteristics of original camera captures
rules.logic: IF complete_exif AND makernotes_present AND (raw_format OR high_quality_jpeg) THEN identify
rules.explanation_template: Image shows {indicator_count} direct camera capture indicators including complete metadata and {format} format.

rules.name: Screenshot Characteristics
rules.description: Identify images likely created as screenshots
rules.logic: IF (no_camera_metadata AND dimensions_match_screen AND contains_ui_elements) THEN identify
rules.explanation_template: Image matches screenshot characteristics: {matched_characteristics}.

gps_analysis.description: Rules for assessing GPS metadata reliability

rules.name: GPS Coordinate Validity Check
rules.description: Verify GPS coordinates are within valid ranges
rules.logic: IF latitude < -90 OR latitude > 90 OR longitude < -180 OR longitude > 180 THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: Invalid GPS coordinates detected: Latitude {lat}, Longitude {lon}. Valid ranges are -90 to 90 for latitude, -180 to 180 for longitude.

rules.name: Default Coordinate Detection
rules.description: Detect default or placeholder GPS coordinates
rules.logic: IF (latitude == 0 AND longitude == 0) OR coordinates_match_common_defaults THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: GPS coordinates match known default location '{default_name}', which may indicate automated or placeholder data.

rules.name: GPS Altitude Anomaly Detection
rules.description: Detect implausible altitude values
rules.logic: IF altitude < -1000 OR altitude > 9000 THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: GPS altitude {altitude}m is outside plausible range ({min}m to {max}m).

rules.name: GPS-Image Timestamp Alignment
rules.description: Check if GPS timestamps align with image capture timestamps
rules.logic: IF gps_timestamp AND abs(gps_timestamp - image_timestamp) > threshold THEN flag
rules.explanation_template: GPS timestamp {gps_time} differs from image timestamp {image_time} by {difference} seconds.

risk_calculation.description: Rules and weights for evidence risk score calculation

VERY_LOW.description: Likely original camera capture with minimal processing
VERY_LOW.forensic_significance: High evidentiary value, suitable for legal proceedings
recommendations: No further analysis required for authenticity

LOW.description: Minor processing or transfer artifacts present
LOW.forensic_significance: Good evidentiary value with documented artifacts

MODERATE.forensic_significance: Moderate evidentiary value, requires careful interpretation

HIGH.forensic_significance: Limited evidentiary value for authenticity claims

VERY_HIGH.description: Strong evidence of tampering or fabrication
VERY_HIGH.forensic_significance: Very limited evidentiary value, likely manipulated

timestamp_inconsistency.title: Timestamp Inconsistency
timestamp_inconsistency.template: Found {count} different timestamps across metadata fields with maximum difference of {max_diff} seconds. Original camera images typically have timestamps within seconds of each other.
timestamp_inconsistency.forensic_significance: Multiple timestamps may indicate: 1) File copying or transfer between devices, 2) Manual timestamp editing, 3) Software processing with timezone conversion, 4) Metadata regeneration after stripping.

software_mismatch.title: Software-Camera Mismatch
software_mismatch.template: Software signature '{software}' doesn't match expected software for {camera_make} cameras. Expected software for {camera_make} includes: {expected_software}.
software_mismatch.forensic_significance: Software mismatches indicate post-capture processing. Common scenarios: 1) Image editing in software like Photoshop, 2) Metadata regeneration after social media sharing, 3) Format conversion between devices.
confidence_factors: Presence of editing keywords in software field

platform_origin.title: Platform Origin Assessment
platform_origin.template: Image characteristics match {platform} platform with {confidence}% confidence based on {match_count} fingerprint matches.
platform_origin.forensic_significance: Platform identification helps establish image provenance and potential manipulation history. Social media platforms often strip metadata and recompress images, reducing evidentiary value.
confidence_factors: Dimension match with known platform specifications

validation.validation_methodology: Cross-validation with ground truth dataset of 10,000 images
